case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. SILVIA PATRICIA HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED OCT-17-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUBON HERNANDEZ, SILVIA PATRICIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-28-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SILVIA PATRICIA HERNANDEZ. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO JUN-28-2024 AT 1:30PM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2024 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DUBON HERNANDEZ, SILVIA PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-29-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-26-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES . DEFENDANT SILVIA PATRICIA HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUBON HERNANDEZ, SILVIA PATRICIA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,640.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO DEC-28-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT SILVIA PATRICIA HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSN OVERTON; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2023 - CONTINUED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO FEB-29-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SALVADOR MEDINA. DEFENDANT SILVIA PATRICIA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. PLAINTIFF STATED THEY HAD REACHED A STIPULATED SETTLEMENT AND WOULD LIKE A CONTROL DATE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
